ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who uploaded the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the app belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the app belongs to */,
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content rating the app has */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the app was released */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the app was last updated */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's icon */,
  "screenshots" TEXT /* URLs of the app's screenshots */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's promotional video */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the app in bytes or megabytes */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system(s) the app supports */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the app */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the app is paid or free */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app if it's paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_content_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("content_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the developer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "content_rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Whether the review can be edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the app */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the app was downloaded */,
  "download_status" TEXT /* Status of the download */,
  "download_progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being tracked */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "installs" INTEGER /* Number of installs of the app */,
  "uninstalls" INTEGER /* Number of uninstalls of the app */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the app */,
  "daily_installs" INTEGER /* Number of daily installs of the app */,
  "monthly_installs" INTEGER /* Number of monthly installs of the app */,
  "avg_rating_over_time" REAL /* Average rating of the app over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)
